name: Production discrepancy: V1 user with wrapped tokens
description: V1 token holder attempting to transfer to payment gateway. Production returns maxFlow:0 while staging finds a path. The source has only 3 trust relations on production. Tests graph completeness and V1/V2 bridge handling.
notes: Source 0x26994472... has hasV1=true. Production pathfinder shows only 3 trust relations for this address suggesting incomplete graph loading. Gateway sink 0xc786be... requires multi-hop path discovery.
